title: pteroselinum alsaticum var. venetum
intro: Pteroselinum alsaticum var. venetum, also known as Alpine Pennryn or Alpine Angelica, is a plant species within the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Pteroselinum alsaticum var. venetum can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
